product_truth: Stratum is currently a live ATS-to-LLM dashboard with Phase 1 foundation infrastructure added. It must become an immutable point-in-time intelligence report system.

chosen_stack.auth: Auth.js with Google OIDC and JWT sessions

completed_work: Central env handling added in src/lib/env.ts
Postgres connection setup added in src/db/client.ts
Drizzle schema scaffolding added for tenants, users, memberships
critical_rules: Do not continue beyond the next approved phase
No live ATS or AI calls on the future report read path
Keep legacy env usage isolated until later phases explicitly replace it
forbidden_scope: Do not implement worker orchestration in Phase 2 if it belongs to Phase 3
Do not implement AI analysis redesign until the approved analysis phase
Do not implement report publishing, claims, citations, HTML reports, or PDF artifacts in Phase 2
Do not refactor unrelated UI for polish
known_risks: The live ATS-to-LLM product path still exists and remains non-enterprise-safe
Auth foundation was built but not browser-verified end-to-end in this conversation
One unrelated lint warning remains in src/components/ui/ServiceInterruptionModal.tsx
AWS vars are optional now but become required when snapshot/artifact storage starts
A hosted Postgres vendor such as Neon was not actually established in the approved source truth
